title: Apple raises prices of Mac and iPad due to RAM crisis
summary: The company increases the price of its computers and tablets due to the increase in the cost of components, especially RAM.

title: Microsoft increases price of Xbox Series X|S consoles by up to $150
summary: The price increase, following Apple's, puts the Xbox Series X more expensive at $749.99 starting in August.

title: US strengthens its anti-China alliance and invests $150 million in xLight to pressure Europe and ASML
summary: The United States incorporates the Netherlands into the Pax Silica block and injects capital into xLight to compete in EUV technology, while Europe resists pressure.

title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of stealing capabilities from its Claude model through fake accounts
summary: The artificial intelligence company alleges that the Chinese company used almost 25,000 accounts to extract information from its Claude assistant.

title: Trump administration bans Polestar from selling its new electric vehicles in the US
summary: The US administration blocks the entry of the Swedish electric car brand, while allowing Volvo to continue its operations.

title: Microsoft extends Windows 10 support until October 2027 amid rejection of Windows 11
summary: The company extends security updates for Windows 10 by another year, while users resist migrating to the new version.

title: Full version of GTA VI will cost 100 euros, the 80 euro edition only includes limited content
summary: Rockstar confirms that the base 80 euro game is a "Lite" edition and that full content requires the 100 euro Ultimate version.

title: IBM unveils the world's first sub-1 nanometer chip
summary: The US company manufactures a processor with sub-nanometer transistors, marking a milestone in the semiconductor industry.

title: Micron breaks records and boosts memory stocks with deals through 2030
summary: The chip maker announces 16 long-term agreements for DRAM, NAND, and HBM, boosting the semiconductor market.

title: Major AI chatbots show political bias towards the left, according to a study
summary: Even models labeled as "anti-woke" show progressive inclinations on political issues, according to comparative analyses.

title: Figma launches a new integrated motion design tool along with AI features
summary: The design platform introduces Figma Motion, which allows creating animations directly in the editor.

title: A seismic doublet shakes Venezuela releasing a century of tectonic energy in 39 seconds
summary: The earthquakes were detected by Android phones before being felt, allowing early warnings to be issued.

title: Social rejection of data centers grows amid protests and concerns over resource consumption
summary: Local communities protest against the installation of large data centers, citing water, energy, and electoral impact issues.

title: Amazon bets on its AI assistant for Prime Day as users look for deals on TVs and headphones
summary: Prime Day promotions include discounts on appliances and electronic devices, with artificial intelligence taking center stage.

title: The rise of artificial intelligence boosts energy consumption and data center costs
summary: Former Databricks executives propose reducing the AI electricity bill by 1,000 times, while the data center boom generates inflation.

title: Developers move from chatbots to physical AI to train robots with video games
summary: Companies like General Intuition invest billions in using virtual environments to train artificial intelligence agents in the real world.

title: OpenAI creates its first custom AI GPU called "Jalapeño" in collaboration with Broadcom
summary: The company develops its own chip optimized for artificial intelligence workloads, seeking to reduce its dependence on external suppliers.

title: Superhuman, AI writing assistant, acquires GPTZero, AI-generated text detector
summary: The acquisition combines artificial content generation and detection tools, expanding the AI-based productivity ecosystem.

title: Google integrates direct screen control in Gemini 3.5 Flash, allowing the model to see and operate the device
summary: Gemini's new capability allows visual interaction with the user interface, executing actions directly on the screen.

title: A Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time thanks to advanced imaging techniques
summary: Researchers succeed in deciphering a scroll charred by the eruption of Vesuvius using artificial intelligence and X-rays.
